state_repository.name: Enter Address on Cox Homepage
state_repository.description: Enter the address to check service availability

params.text: Enter your address and unlock our best available price!

state_repository.name: Internet Available at Address on Cox
state_repository.description: Internet service is available at this address

params.text: Cox high-speed internet plans and pricing

state_prompts:
## State: Navigate To Cox
- **Description:** Navigated to the Cox Website
- **Triggers:**
	1. If it is on the chrome homescreen
- **Actions:**
	1. Go to https://www.cox.com/residential/internet.html word for word
	2. TERMINATE AT THIS POINT

## State: Enter Address on Cox Homepage
- **Description:** Enter the address to check service availability
- **Triggers:**
	1. If on the Cox homepage with an address input field
- **Actions:**
	1. FOLLOW THESE INSTRUCTIONS CLOSELY
	2. Click the address input field
	3. Type `%address%` into the address input field
	4. Wait for address suggestions to appear
	5. Press down key to select the first suggestion
	6. You must press the submit button to confirm
	7. TERMINATE AT THIS POINT

## State: Handle Existing Customer Question
- **Description:** Handle the question about existing Cox customer
- **Triggers:**
	1. If asked 'Are you an existing Cox customer?' or similar
- **Actions:**
	1. Click 'No' or 'New Customer' button
	2. TERMINATE AT THIS POINT

## State: If it is one of these options
- **Description:** If it is asking if it is one of these options, click the first option
- **Triggers:**
	1. If it is asking if it is one of these options
- **Actions:**
	1. Click the first option and check availability
	2. TERMINATE AT THIS POINT

## State: Internet Available at Address on Cox
- **Description:** Internet service is available at this address
- **Triggers:**
	1. If you see internet plans, pricing, or 'Shop plans' or 'View plans' options
- **Actions:**
	1. TERMINATE AT THIS POINT
- **End State:** Service Available

## State: Internet Not Available at Address on Cox
- **Description:** Internet service is not available at this address
- **Triggers:**
	1. If you see 'service not available', 'not in your area', or 'we don't offer service'
- **Actions:**
	1. TERMINATE AT THIS POINT
- **End State:** Service Not Available
synthesis_choice:
## State: Internet Available at Address on Cox
- **Description:** Internet service is available at this address
- **Triggers:**
	1. If you see internet plans, pricing, or 'Shop plans' or 'View plans' options
- **Actions:**
	1. TERMINATE AT THIS POINT
- **End State:** Service Available
